readme_hadron_geometric_mean_prescriptio.reason: The README gives F_hadron geometric mean for hadron binding, which is structurally aligned with triplet aggregation but the numeric table exactly matches benchmarks; therefore it cannot close Debt 9.

metatheory_nucleon_mu0_scale.reason: The source explicitly calibrates mu0_N to proton mass; it can document a hadron scale boundary but not a no-parameter prediction.

v40_Wij_holonomy.reason: W_ij loop defect/curvature is structural and PDG-free in module 40; used only as dimensionless action diagnostic.

v56_quark_single_proxy.reason: Single-quark proxies are non-asymptotic and cannot be exact mass closure criteria.
